title: v5.1.0 — Combo & Income
message:
Big progression update!

🔥 Combo Streaks — play different games in one session to earn a bonus multiplier on all wins (up to ×1.9)
🏦 Bank Interest — earn passive income based on your tier every 4 hours
🏆 Weekly Missions — 3 new challenges every week with chip rewards
📊 Enhanced Stats — per-game win rate bars and analysis
🔍 Accessibility Zoom — scale the app 50%–300% in Customize
✨ Smoother animations throughout
